paired_synchronized_vs_shuffled.reason: Frozen whole-window different-event-group donor bijection is infeasible on at least one fixed fold side. No donors, folds, or endpoints were relaxed.

imu_gate.reason: paired synchronized-minus-shuffled gate is invalid and cannot pass

interpretation: Synchronized IMU-vs-chance estimates are descriptive only. They cannot substitute for the preregistered paired synchronized-minus-shuffled estimand, and authorize no confirmation access, locked experiment, or external outreach.
